name: @aohys/site
description: Astro public SEO surface for aohys.com.

scripts.build: pnpm run sync:headers && astro build && pnpm --filter @aohys/dashboard build && node ../../scripts/copy-dashboard-assets.mjs
scripts.lint: pnpm run sync:headers:check && vitest run test/source-quality.test.ts
scripts.test: pnpm run sync:headers:check && vitest run test/analytics.test.ts test/csp-reporting.test.ts test/dashboard-access.test.ts test/auth-proxy.test.ts && astro build && vitest run test/public-shell-build.test.ts test/public-routes-build.test.ts
